query:
DELETE c1 FROM cities c1
INNER JOIN cities c2 
WHERE c1.name = c2.name 
AND c1.countryId = c2.countryId 
AND c1.id > c2.id;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user BsRQq1X2Mh9kZmK.6749932367bb --database WqXabcMRQ5aEFJ4QyeefuN --execute DELETE c1 FROM cities c1
INNER JOIN cities c2 
WHERE c1.name = c2.name 
AND c1.countryId = c2.countryId 
AND c1.id > c2.id;
